title: Gooey Italian Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Italian-inspired stir fry with gooey cheese and crispy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables (e.g. bell peppers, onions, broccoli)

instructions: Cut the Italian bread into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of butter and toss to coat.
Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the gooey cheese until melted and well combined.
Add the chopped basil and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the vegetable mixture over the toasted bread.
Drizzle with additional butter if desired.
